The definitions of the purchases are as stated below;
(a) transactions made in Ringgit Malaysia at selected dining merchants with registered Merchant Category Code (MCC) of 5812 or 5813 or 5814 are defined as Dining Retail Purchases.
(b) transactions made in Ringgit Malaysia at Airline, hotel and online travel agent with MCCs of 3000 – 3299, 3501-3999, 4511, 4722, 7011, 7012 are defined as Travel Retail Purchases.
(c) transactions performed outside Malaysia in foreign currency are defined as Overseas Retail Purchases.

For every RM 5 spent on local retail purchases in Ringgit Malaysia posted on to Journey Credit Card, 1 Miles point will be credited to your Journey Card account.

Excluded Petrol Transaction, Utilities and eWallet.

title: BSN Visa Cash Back Credit Card
credit_card_name: BSN Visa Cash Back Credit Card
mileage_points_description: Not a Mileage Card
cash_back_description:
The BSN Visa Cash Back Credit Card gives you up to 5% Cash Back when you spend on groceries, dining, petrol and other categories.

Cash Back is capped at RM15 per category per month for groceries, dining and petrol (capped at maximum RM45 per Cardholder per month) with the following tiers
Tier 1: 0.2% on Groceries, Dining and Petrol if the total monthly spend amount is less than RM 1,000
Tier 2: 1.0% on Groceries, Dining and Petrol if the total monthly spend amount is from RM 1,000 to RM 2,999.99
Tier 2: 5.0% on Groceries, Dining and Petrol if the total monthly spend amount is at least RM 3,000

Cash Back earned for other retail 0.2% and overseas spend 1.0% is unlimited with no monthly cap.

credit_card_name: AmBank SIGNATURE Priority Banking - The Metal Visa Infinite Credit Card
mileage_points_description:
Get 10X AmBonus Point for every RM 1 swipe on retail transactions overseas (excluding online purchases).
Gain 1X AmBonus Point for every RM 1 swipe on other transactions, excluding petrol and eWallet.
other_description: Premium Plaza Lounge List Lounge Access: 1. AmSPB member with AUM below RM 200,000 - 6X access per calendar year (Principal Cardholder ONLY) with a minimum spend of RM1,000 within 30 calendar days before and/or 30 calendar days after each lounge access. 2. AmSPB member with AUM from RM 200,000 to RM 499,999 - 8X access per calendar year (Principal Cardholder and Supplementary Cardholder) without spending requirement. 3. AmSPB member with AUM above RM 500,000 - Unlimited access per calendar year (Principal Cardholder and Supplementary Cardholder) without spending requirement. To be eligible for the complimentary access, the respective AmSPB Primary and/or Supplementary member MUST maintain their individual respective Principal AUM on the month of access as stated in the table above with the Bank. The AUM criteria on the access month are based on the month end position (final day of the month). Assets Under Management (AUM)” means the total deposits of the Customer (as Primary Account holder) which include Current Account/ Current Account-i, Savings Account/ Saving Account-i or Fixed Deposit/Term Deposit (including Foreign Currency Account/ Foreign Currency Account-i) and total Investment product holdings of the customer (as Primary Accountholder) inclusive Bancassurance/Bancatakaful whether Conventional or Islamic in the Bank. LoungeKey Lounges access is open to all Principal and Supplementary AmBank SIGNATURE Priority Banking The Metal Visa Infinite Credit Card Cardholders. Terms & Conditions

title: AmBank BonusLink Visa Signature Card
expenses_petrol_rate: 30 Bonus Link (every RM 20 spend) SHELL ONLY
expenses_shopping_rate: 30 Bonus Link (every RM 20 spend) PARKSON ONLY
mileage_points_description:
1. For every local retail transaction made in Ringgit Malaysia at grocery stores, online, dining outlets, entertainment outlets, Shell petrol and all Parkson department stores bearing the MCC as set out in Table A below, 30 BonusLink Points will be awarded for every Ringgit Malaysia Twenty (RM 20) spent using a BonusLink Co-Brand Card (“30 BLP: RM 20 spent”)
2. The award of 30 BLP: RM 20 spent on retail transactions listed above is capped at a maximum of 3,000 BonusLink Points (which is equivalent to spending an aggregate sum of Ringgit Malaysia Two Thousand (RM 2,000) on the said transactions) for each BonusLink Co-Brand Cardholder per statement month.
3. Once a BonusLink Co-Brand Cardholder earns 3,000 BonusLink Points from the 30 BLP: RM 20 spent on the retail transactions listed in Table A for the month, his subsequent retail spending will revert to 3 BLP: RM 20 spent for the remainder of the month.
4. No BonusLink Points will be awarded for transactions performed at Shell or any petrol transactions after the BonusLink Co-Brand Cardholder earns 3,000 BonusLink Points from the 30 BLP: RM 20 spent on the retail transactions listed above for the month.
5. No additional BonusLink Points will be awarded if an online transaction also bears the same MCC for groceries, dining, entertainment, Shell petrol or Parkson department stores.
6. AmBank BonusLink Visa Signature Cardholders will earn 6 BonusLink Points for every Ringgit Malaysia Twenty (RM 20) spent on transactions made overseas or transactions charged in foreign currency using the BonusLink Co-Brand Card.
7. AmBank BonusLink Visa Cardholders will earn 3 BonusLink Points for every Ringgit Malaysia Twenty (RM 20) spent for these types of online transactions: Bill payment transactions via mobile phone, Utility payment transactions, Insurance payment transactions and Direct Marketing transactions.
8. Redeem 5,700 BonusLink Points to get RM50 cash credit. The RM50 cash will be credited to your credit card account. Redemption can be in multiples of RM 50.
other_description: Premium Plaza Lounge List 6X access per calendar year with a minimum spend of Ringgit Malaysia One Thousand (RM 1,000) within 30 calendar days before and/or 30 calendar days after each lounge access.

mileage_points_description: Bonus Points award is subject to 1,000,000 overall statement capping and 50,000 - 100,000 capping on selected Merchant Category Codes per statement. Principal and Supplementary cardholders have their own respective capping. 8X Bonus Points on Overseas, Airlines and Duty Free stores. 2X Bonus Points on other local spend. 1X Bonus Points on Local Education, Local Insurance and Local Utilities. Points transfer redemption must be made in multiples of 5,000 Miles/Points of the respective Points Transfer Partners with a minimum of 5,000 Miles/Points redemption Hotels IHG One Rewards 50,000 BP for 5,000 points Marriott Bonvoy 50,000 BP for 5,000 points ALL - Accor Live Limitless 125,000 BP for 5,000 points
other_description: Premium Plaza Lounge List The Airport Lounge Access is applicable to and shared between the Principal Cardholder and his/her Supplementary Cardholder(s). Each Cardholder will receive 3X lounge access per quarter with minimum quarterly spend of RM6,000. Capped at 12X lounge access per annum. Complimentary entry to children below 2 years old. Q1: 01 January till 31 March Q2: 01 April till 30 June Q3: 01 July till 30 September Q4: 01 October till 31 December Exclusive 12X Sky Lounge access at SkyPark Terminal, Sultan Abdul Aziz Shah Airport (Subang Airport)
